title: Reliability and stability of cerebral palsy classification scales for individuals with STXBP1- and SYNGAP1-related disorders
authors: Pierce SR, Orlando JM, Cunningham KG, Ruggiero SM, Kaufman MC, Mckee JL, Helbig I
abstract: Determines interrater reliability and stability of GMFCS, MACS/Mini-MACS, and CFCS in individuals with STXBP1- and SYNGAP1-related disorders. N=83 STXBP1, N=101 SYNGAP1 from prospective natural history study.
